name: materials-search
description: Bundled material Excel search tool for local material master and B-side hardener classification workbooks.

tools.name: materials_search
tools.description: Search local material Excel workbooks by material code, CAS, chemical name, category, hardener family, or B-side compatibility rules. Use for material master lookup, material property lookup, and B-side hardener safety checks from the configured Excel files.

action.description: Operation to run. Defaults to schema when omitted.

materials.description: Material codes or names to look up or validate.

cas_numbers.description: CAS numbers to look up in the material master workbook.

family.description: Hardener family filter, for example 胺类, 酸酐, or 预浸料.

category.description: Material category filter, for example 固化剂, 促进剂, or 树脂.

has_fields.description: Column names that must be non-empty for action=filter.

limit.description: Maximum number of material master rows to return.

include_all_fields.description: Include complete raw workbook rows in material master results.

data_dir.description: Directory containing the default material Excel workbooks.

master_map_path.description: Explicit path to material_label_map_w_chemicalname_分類_性質數據.xlsx.

b_classification_path.description: Explicit path to 原材料分类.xlsx.
